{{Navbox
|name  = Online social networking
|title = [[Social networking service]]s
|listclass = hlist
|state = {{{state|autocollapse}}}
|
  |group1 = [[List of social networking websites|Personal]]
  |list1  =
* [[23snaps]]
* [[Amikumu]]
* [[aNobii]]
* [[Ask.fm]]
* [[Badoo]]
* [[BeReal]]
* [[Bumble]]
* [[Clash (app)|Clash]]
* [[Clubhouse (app)|Clubhouse]] 
* [[Cyworld]]
* [[Diaspora (social network)|Diaspora]]
* [[Display!|display!]]
* [[Douban]]
* [[Draugiem.lv]]
* [[Ello (social network)|Ello]]
* [[Facebook]]
* [[Foursquare City Guide]]
* [[Foursquare Swarm]]
* [[Friendica]]
* [[Gab (social network)|Gab]]
* [[Gapo]]
* [[Gas (app)|Gas]]
* [[Gettr]]
* [[GNU social]]
* [[Hi5]]
* [[Idka]]
* [[Instagram]]
**[[IGTV]]
* [[IRC-Galleria]]
* [[Kumu (social network)|Kumu]]
* [[Letterboxd]]
* [[LiveJournal]]
* [[Likee]]
* [[Marco Polo (app)|Marco Polo]]
* [[Mastodon (software)|Mastodon]]
* [[MeetMe]]
* [[Meetup]]
* [[MeWe]]
* [[Miaopai]]
* [[micro.blog]]
* [[Minds (social network)|Minds]]
* [[Mixi]]
* [[Moj (app)|Moj]]
* [[MX TakaTak]]
* [[Myspace]]
* [[My World@Mail.Ru|My World]]
* [[Nextdoor]]
* [[Odnoklassniki]] (OK.ru)
* [[Parler]]
* [[Peach (social network)|Peach]]
* [[Pinterest]]
* [[Pixnet]]
* [[Plurk]]
* [[Qzone]]
* [[Readgeek]]
* [[Renren]]
* [[ShareChat]]
* [[Sina Weibo]]
* [[Slidely]]
* [[Snapchat]]
* [[Snow (app)|SNOW]]
* [[Spaces (social network)|Spaces]]
* [[Spotify Greenroom]]
* [[Tagged (website)|Tagged]]
* [[Taringa!]]
* [[TikTok]]
* [[Tinder (app)|Tinder]]
* [[Triller (app)|Triller]]
* [[Truth Social]]
* [[Tuenti]]
* [[TV Time]]
* [[Tumblr]]
* [[Twitter]]
* [[Untappd]]
* [[Vero (app)|Vero]]
* [[VK (service)|VK]]
* [[Whisper (app)|Whisper]]
* [[Xiaohongshu]]
* [[Yik Yak]]
  |group2 = [[Professional network service|Professional]]
  |list2  =
* [[Academia.edu]]
* [[Brainly]]
* [[BranchOut]]
* [[Google Currents]]
* [[HCL Connections]]
* [[LinkedIn]]
* [[Moodle]]
* [[ResearchGate]]
* [[Solaborate]]
* [[Viadeo]]
* [[XING]]
* [[Yammer]]
  |group3 = [[List of defunct social networking websites|Defunct]]
  |list3  =
* [[App.net]]
* [[AsianAve]]
* [[Avatars United]]
* [[Bebo]]
* [[Bolt (website)|Bolt]]
* [[Capazoo]]
* [[Cloob]]
* [[eConozco]]
* [[Edmodo]]
* [[Emojli]]
* [[eWorld]]
* [[Eyegroove]]
* [[FitFinder]]
* [[Formspring]]
* [[FriendFeed]]
* [[Friends Reunited]]
* [[Friendster]]
* [[Grono.net]]
* [[Google+]]
* [[Google Buzz]]
* [[Hello (social network)|Hello]]
* [[Heello]]
* [[Highlight (application)|Highlight]]
* [[Houseparty (app)|Houseparty]]
* [[Hyves]]
* [[IdeaPlane]]
* [[iTunes Ping]]
* [[iWiW]]
* [[Jaiku]]
* [[Keek]]
* [[Lifeknot]]
* [[LunarStorm]]
* [[Me2day]]
* [[Meerkat (app)|Meerkat]]
* [[MixBit]]
* [[Mobli]]
* [[Mugshot (website)|Mugshot]]
* [[Multiply (website)|Multiply]]
* [[Musical.ly]]
* [[Natter Social Network]]
* [[Netlog]]
* [[NK.pl]]
* [[Orkut]]
* [[Path (social network)|Path]]
* [[Periscope (service)|Periscope]]
* [[Pheed]]
* [[Piczo]]
* [[PlanetAll]]
* [[Posterous]]
* [[Pownce]]
* [[Qaiku]]
* [[Sciencescape]] (Meta<sup>α</sup>)
* [[SixDegrees.com]]
* [[So.cl]]
* [[Spring.me]]
* [[Streetlife (website)|Streetlife]]
* [[StudiVZ]]
* [[Surfbook]]
* [[tbh (app)|tbh]]
* [[Tea Party Community]]
* [[Third Voice]]
* [[tribe.net]]
* [[Tout (company)|Tout]]
* [[Tsū (social network)|Tsū]]
* [[tvtag]]
* [[Vine (service)|Vine]]
* [[Windows Live Spaces]]
* [[Wretch (website)|Wretch]]
* [[Xanga]]
* [[Yahoo! 360°]]
* [[Yahoo! Kickstart]]
* [[Yahoo! Mash]]
* [[Yahoo! Meme]]
* [[Yo (app)|Yo]]
|group4 = Services
|list4  =
* [[Comparison of social networking software|Software comparison]]
*[[White-label product|White-label]]
** [[Ning (website)|Ning]]
** [[Wall.fm]]
|
|group5 = Tools
|list5  =
* [[Social network analysis software]]
* [[Diaspora (software)]]
* [[Web 2.0 Suicide Machine]]
|
|group6 = Concepts
|list6  =
* [[Attention inequality]]
* [[Cybersectarianism]]
* [[Fediverse]]
* [[List of virtual communities with more than 1 million users|1+ million users]]
* [[Online identity]]
* [[Small-world experiment]]
* [[Small-world network]]
* [[Social network]]
* [[Thirst trap]]
* [[User profile]]
* [[Virtual community]]
|
|group7 = Applications
|list7  =
* [[Hospitality exchange service]]
* [[Mobile social network|Mobile]]
* [[Online dating service]] ([[Comparison of online dating websites|comparison]])
* [[Social network advertising]]
* [[Social network hosting service]]
|
|group8 = [[User interface]]
|list8  =
* [[Activity stream]]
* [[Brand page]]
* [[Group (online social networking)|Groups]]
* [[Hashtag]]
* [[Like button]]
* [[Online petition]]s
* [[Open access poll|Polling]]
* [[Reblogging]]
* [[Stories (social media)|Stories]]
|
|group9 = Implications
|list9  =
* [[Issues relating to social networking services]]
* [[Privacy issues of social networking sites|Privacy issues]]
* [[Use of social network websites in investigations|Use in investigations]]
* [[Gender differences in social network service use|User gender difference]]
|
|group10 = Protocols
|list10  =
* [[ActivityPub]]
* [[Distributed Social Networking Protocol]] (defunct)
* [[Micropub (protocol)|Micropub]]
* [[OpenSocial]] (defunct)
* [[OStatus]]
* [[Pump.io]]
* [[XMPP]]
}}<noinclude>
{{doc|content=
{{collapsible option}}
[[Category:Social networking services|*]]
[[Category:Society and social science navigational boxes]]
[[sn:Online social networking]]}}
</noinclude>
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
